values.description: Base URL for local development. Change to production URL for live testing.
Paste the value of ADMIN_API_KEY from .env here. Required for PUT /api/profile.

info.name: Thabo Portfolio — Local
info.description:
Environment variables for the Thabo Portfolio API collection.

Instructions:
1. Set admin_api_key to the value of ADMIN_API_KEY in your .env file.
2. Import the Thabo-Portfolio.postman_collection.json collection.
3. Select this environment in Postman before running requests.
